title: hardenbergia macrophylla
intro: Hardenbergia macrophylla, also known as the Native Violet or Purple Coral Pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hardenbergia macrophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hardenbergia macrophylla is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in various forms, including capsules and tablets.
